publishedAbstract: - App pods running mounting ceph-rbd PVs are left in CreateContainerError, Terminating, CrashLoopBackOff- In the kernel logs (dmesg-T) of the OCP node hosting the App Pods we can find errors like: ~~~ 2025-02-25T11:44:06.181157+0000 kernel: rbd: rbd3: encountered watch error:-107 2025-02-25T11:45:07.828163+0000 kernel: rbd: rbd3: failed to unwatch:-110 2025-02-25T11:45:07.828311+0000 kernel: rbd: rbd4: encountered watch error:-107 2025-02-25T11:46:09.268158+0000 kernel: rbd: rbd4: failed to unwatch:-110 2025-02-25T11:46:09.268298+0000 kernel: rbd: rbd2: encountered watch error:-107 2025-02-25T11:47:10.708159+0000 kernel: rbd: rbd2: failed to unwatch:-110 2025-02-25T11:47:10.708327+0000 kernel: rbd: rbd5: encountered watch error:-107 2025-02-25T11:48:12.149156+0000 kernel: rbd: rbd5: failed to unwatch:-110 ~~~- What does the message `rbd: rbdX: encountered watch error:-107` mean?
publishedTitle: Ceph/ODF/OSP:  Ceph RBD Client error "kernel: rbd: rbdX: encountered watch error: -107" in kernel logs and/or dmesg.
